description: Built-in worker profile for the existing local Codex CLI execution path.

command_templates.exec: codex exec --cd {run_dir} --skip-git-repo-check --model {model} --sandbox workspace-write --color never --output-last-message {output_last} -c approval_policy={approval} -c model_reasoning_effort={effort} -c web_search=disabled -c sandbox_workspace_write.network_access={network} --json -
